title: Upper Celestial
content:
Upper Celestial
 was the Celestial equivalent to a Qi Cultivator's 
Ascendant
 stage, as well as the 
Illusory Yin
 and 
Corporeal Yang
 stages there within, during the reign of the 
Celestial Domain
 and later on its subsidiary four Celestial realms. This realm was created to help 
Sealed Realm
 Cultivators eventually reach the Third Step despite the presence of the 
Realm-Sealing Formation
 preventing the creation of 
Joss Flames
.

Contents

1

Process

2

Stages

3

Trivia

4

Links and References

Process
[
]

At the peak of Soul Formation a Cultivator would experience a tribulation. Those who survive would be brought into the Celestial Domain or one of its four subsidiary realms, which originally served as passageways. They would be given a true 
Celestial Body
 and would then achieve this form.

This process would be equivalent to  the 
Soul Transformation
  stage in its entirety and takes only a very short time to undergo.

The sole demerit for a modern Cultivator undergoing this process would be the loss of their 
Domain
 as Qi Cultivators from the Celestial era didn't Cultivate Domains, they would instead become able to Cultivate Celestial Origin Qi.

Trivia
[
]

The Thunder Celestials of the 
Allheaven Star System
 were able to undergo a conversion process to enter this path at the expense of giving up on their Qi Cultivator path.
